items.summary: Update the global CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css to use a violet and black color combo: set the primary/accent colors to violet tones, set the main background color to pink, and update the grid background utility colors to yellow. Ensure both light and dark theme tokens reflect this new palette consistently.

Update frontend/tailwind.config.js color tokens to align with the new violet/black/pink/yellow palette, ensuring Tailwind utility classes used across components (badges, cards, buttons, year badges, navigation) pick up the updated theme colors.

Update the SparkParticles component (frontend/src/components/SparkParticles.tsx) to use the new violet/pink/yellow color schemes for the floating pill particles instead of the existing warm brown/skin-tone schemes.
